$comment: Source-research plans for the UK finance 2027 cycle. Produced by a plan-before-execute research pass on 2026-06-05. Every classification is tied to live observed evidence; uncertainty is recorded per plan. NOTHING here authorizes login, form submission, or applying — listings are read from PUBLIC surfaces only. activation_status gates whether the execution layer may auto-publish. See docs/source-research/uk-finance-source-plans.md for the full evidence write-up.

validation_rules: Role URL must match higher.gs.com/roles/<digits>; reject anything off higher.gs.com
Title/description must indicate Summer Analyst/Internship AND location in {London, UK, EMEA}; drop full-time/lateral and non-UK
Confirm penultimate/final-year student eligibility text before classifying as summer internship
Require a resolvable role id; treat 404/expired role pages as removals only after 2 consecutive misses

change_detection.unique_key: numeric role id from /roles/<id> (apply_url secondary)
change_detection.notes: SPA rendering needs a headless render or discovered XHR to enumerate ids; first_seen_at/last_seen_at trackable per role id; removal detection best-effort

plans.evidence: Self-hosted careers domain higher.gs.com with deterministic role URL pattern /roles/<numeric_id> (observed 139290, 145646, 137473, 165101, 128541). No myworkdayjobs/greenhouse/lever/ashby/taleo/oraclecloud host. Page is a client-side SPA; WebFetch returned title-only with no server-rendered listings or JSON-LD. No public jobs JSON/GraphQL endpoint observed.
plans.uncertainty: Could not observe a public JSON/GraphQL listings endpoint or JSON-LD JobPosting (SPA returned title-only). The search endpoint powering higher.gs.com/results is unverified; classification rests on host + /roles/<id> URL pattern only.
plans.notes: Custom self-hosted SPA careers site; no public ATS JSON feed observed. Verify rendering approach before auto-publish.

validation_rules: Pin to Workday tenant ms site External via POST /wday/cxs/ms/External/jobs (appliedFacets/searchText/limit/offset)
Filter to summer analyst/intern titles AND locations in {London, Glasgow, United Kingdom}; drop full-time and non-UK
De-duplicate against legacy ms.taleo.net: if a role appears on both, prefer the Workday record and suppress the Taleo duplicate
Treat ms.taleo.net (careersection/2 and 2m) as legacy/secondary; only surface a Taleo role if absent from Workday

change_detection.unique_key: Workday JR<digits> requisition id (Taleo job=<digits> secondary)
change_detection.notes: CXS JSON gives stable JR ids + postedOn + externalPath for clean first/last_seen; GET returned 400, endpoint requires POST body

plans.evidence: Workday host ms.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com site External (live job pages e.g. /External/job/Intern--_JR008039; req pattern JR<digits>). ALSO live legacy Taleo ms.taleo.net/careersection/2/jobdetail.ftl?job=<digits>. Two ATS hosts indexed simultaneously => migration in progress.
plans.uncertainty: Could not execute the Workday CXS POST to confirm exact JSON body/field names live (GET returned 400). Could not confirm whether current UK summer-analyst roles sit on Workday vs Taleo; the de-dup rule is mandatory until resolved.
plans.notes: Dual ATS (Taleo legacy + Workday) live = migration; pin Workday as canonical and de-dup against Taleo.

validation_rules: Query recruitingCEJobRequisitions with finder=findReqs;siteNumber=CX_1001, paginate via limit/offset, never authenticate
Filter to UK: PrimaryLocation or secondaryLocations contains London/United Kingdom; combine with keyword/title match for Summer Analyst/Summer Internship
For each summary req, fetch the detail resource by Id for full location/eligibility before publishing
Reject non-summer (off-cycle/full-time/Spring Insight) and non-UK rows

change_detection.unique_key: Oracle requisition Id (numeric, e.g. 210608348)
change_detection.notes: Stable Id + PostedDate; paginated/facetable JSON enables clean diffs and first/last_seen

plans.evidence: Oracle Cloud HCM host jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com, CandidateExperience site CX_1001. VERIFIED LIVE public REST endpoint /hcmRestApi/resources/latest/recruitingCEJobRequisitions?onlyData=true&finder=findReqs;siteNumber=CX_1001 returned JSON (total 7171; LONDON facet 517; 'summer internship' keyword -> 47 reqs). No login required for the listings JSON.
plans.uncertainty: List-mode facet responses sometimes omitted per-row PrimaryLocation/Id (returned aggregates), so a per-Id detail fetch is required to verify each UK summer role. Did not confirm the exact param to pin location=London server-side; UK filtering may need client-side post-filter.
plans.notes: Live public Oracle Cloud HCM REST JSON confirmed. Strongest, most deterministic source in the set.

validation_rules: Source student roles from careers.bankofamerica.com/en-us/students/job-search; use the job-detail id (e.g. 13355) as key. Do NOT log into bankcampuscareers.tal.net (apply step is auth-gated)
Filter to Summer Analyst/Intern AND location London/UK; reject full-time and lateral (Workday ghr.wd1) roles
Do not mix the lateral Workday tenant ghr with campus roles; campus != lateral feed
Treat the tal.net candidate portal as apply-only/login-gated; never enumerate it behind auth

change_detection.unique_key: numeric job-detail id in the careers URL (e.g. 13355); apply_url secondary
change_detection.notes: Student careers front-end is JS-rendered; needs headless render or backing search XHR to enumerate ids; first/last_seen per id trackable; backing listings API not observed live

plans.evidence: Campus application center on bankcampuscareers.tal.net/candidate (tal.net) for students. Lateral roles use Workday ghr.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com (separate). Student listings render on careers.bankofamerica.com/en-us/students/job-detail/13355/... (job id 13355). WebFetch of the careers front-end returned 404/empty (JS-rendered).
plans.uncertainty: Could not observe the backing JSON/XHR powering the student job-search (front-end JS-rendered). source_type tal_net reflects the confirmed campus apply system, but the public listing endpoint and its stable-id scheme are unverified.
plans.notes: Campus apply = bankcampuscareers.tal.net (tal_net, login-gated); lateral = Workday ghr.wd1 (separate). Student listing API not observed live.

validation_rules: Job detail URL must match jobs.citi.com/job/<city>/<slug>/287/<numeric_id>; reject other hosts
Keep only UK city (London/Belfast) AND title matching (summer (analyst|intern)|internship|industrial placement) AND program/year = summer 2026/2027; exclude full-time and off-cycle unless flagged
Cross-check the TalentBrew listing against the Eightfold PCSX result count; if counts diverge >20%, queue manual review
Require a resolvable apply URL on the same host before publishing

change_detection.unique_key: numeric Citi req id (trailing URL segment, e.g. 86241846896); display title secondary
change_detection.notes: first_seen/last_seen per req id; debounce 2 polls before removal; TalentBrew paginates and may server-render partial lists

plans.evidence: Front end is TalentBrew (tbcdn.talentbrew.com/company/287; company id 287 also in job URLs /job/london/.../287/<id>). Search is Eightfold ('Match Me, powered by Eightfold', citi.eightfold.ai). Eightfold public PCSX search pattern citi.eightfold.ai/api/pcsx/search?domain=citi.com exists; GET probe returned 403 (token-gated). Facets observed: Internship (24), Summer Analyst (14).
plans.uncertainty: Could not retrieve a live JSON body from Eightfold/PCSX (403 on GET) nor confirm JSON-LD on detail pages. Exact UK summer-internship count not directly enumerated (only aggregate facet counts across all geographies).
plans.notes: Seed URL citigroup.com/global/early-careers is 404 — corrected to jobs.citi.com. Eightfold PCSX JSON exists publicly but raw GET 403'd; do not authenticate — stay on the public HTML/TalentBrew surface.

validation_rules: Call Workday CXS via POST /wday/cxs/barclays/External_Career_Site_Barclays/jobs {limit,offset,searchText,appliedFacets}; parse jobPostings[] (title, externalPath, locationsText, postedOn, bulletFields)
Keep only locationsText containing a UK location AND title/family matching (summer (analyst|intern)|internship|industrial placement|insight); exclude full-time grad and non-UK
Resolve each externalPath to a canonical Workday job URL and require it 200s before publishing
If an apply link routes to barclays.taleo.net (legacy), flag for review — some divisions may still route to Taleo

change_detection.unique_key: Workday externalPath job slug + trailing numeric req id (also 13015/<id> in the TalentBrew URL)
change_detection.notes: postedOn aids first_seen; paginate offset/limit fully; debounce 2 polls before removal

plans.evidence: Login/apply links resolve to barclays.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/External_Career_Site_Barclays/login (wd3 = canonical Workday host). Tenant=barclays, site=External_Career_Site_Barclays. Front end is TalentBrew (tbcdn.talentbrew.com); job URL /job/<city>/<title>/13015/<job-id>. GET to CXS /jobs returned 400 (needs POST). Legacy barclays.taleo.net also surfaced but live early-careers apply goes to Workday.
plans.uncertainty: Did not retrieve a live CXS JSON body (GET 400; correct call is POST, not issued to avoid heavy interaction). Did not confirm whether any specific early-careers programmes still route through legacy barclays.taleo.net.
plans.notes: Seed assumption of tal.net is incorrect — backend is Workday (wd3).

validation_rules: Restrict crawl to jobs.ubs.com siteid=5131 (graduate board); ignore 5012/5050
Keep only UK office locations AND title matching (summer internship|summer analyst|industrial placement); exclude off-cycle and full-time grad unless separately flagged
Each parsed role must have a stable Avature JobDetail URL that 200s before publishing
Re-resolve LinkID linkquery targets periodically — UBS rotates LinkIDs per campaign

change_detection.unique_key: Avature requisition id from JobDetail URL (fallback: normalized title + UK location + program year)
change_detection.notes: Avature does not expose reliable first_seen server timestamps; track first/last_seen locally; debounce 2 polls before removal; apply is login-gated (listings public)

plans.evidence: All Apply/Search CTAs resolve to jobs.ubs.com/TGnewUI/Search/... with partnerid=25008 & siteid=5131 — the canonical Avature careersite signature (siteid 5131=graduates, 5012=experienced, 5050=German). No myworkdayjobs/taleo/oraclecloud host in the apply chain.
plans.uncertainty: Did not enumerate live UK summer-internship requisitions on siteid=5131, nor confirm the exact Avature JobDetail URL/id format for UBS (inferred from standard Avature pattern). Could not verify whether an Avature JSON/XHR search endpoint is reachable unauthenticated.
plans.notes: Platform is Avature (TGnewUI), not Taleo despite Oracle association; no public JSON feed.

validation_rules: Do not auto-publish until the SPA's backing data request (JSON/XHR) is identified and validated; until then, detect change and route to manual review queue
Filter to UK & Ireland region + Internship Programme (penultimate-year summer); exclude Insight programmes (Spring into Banking, GROW, Rise, Advance) unless separately categorized
If an apply link resolves to db.recsolu.com, capture the requisition id from /external/requisitions/<id>/ as a deterministic anchor but verify it 200s; never proceed into new_candidate
Require region + programme-year confirmation in the parsed record before any publish

change_detection.unique_key: careers.db.com programme path + recsolu requisition id when present; fallback content_hash of rendered card
change_detection.notes: Run detection on rendered DOM (hash-routed SPA), not raw HTML; track first/last_seen locally; recsolu requisitions give a cleaner id when present

plans.evidence: Programme search is a SPA using hash routing (#/graduate/) on careers.db.com — listings render client-side; NO JSON/GraphQL endpoint, ATS host, or JSON-LD exposed across two fetches. A separate apply link pointed to db.recsolu.com/external/requisitions/.../new_candidate (recsolu = Yello/Rakuna), indicating some requisitions are externalized while the student catalog is custom.
plans.uncertainty: Could not observe the SPA's backing data request, so the true source_type behind the catalog is unconfirmed (custom_json plausible but unverified — defaulted to custom_html). Could not confirm whether db.recsolu.com handles all early-careers applications or a subset, nor enumerate live UK summer reqs.
plans.notes: Bespoke SPA catalog; some apply flows externalize to db.recsolu.com (Yello/Rakuna). No public feed observed.

validation_rules: Query the Eightfold positions API filtered by location (UK/London) and seniority/jobType=intern/student; treat empty positions:[] as a valid 'no current openings' state, not an error
Confirm each role is a SUMMER INTERNSHIP (not graduate/apprenticeship/off-cycle/full-time) via title + programme-type, and is UK-located
Require finance/banking business area (Global Banking & Markets, Markets, Banking) — exclude tech-only/operations unless finance-relevant
Cross-check the Eightfold position has a live apply URL on apply.careers.hsbc.com before publishing
Reject if a listing only resolves to a talent-network 'join' form with no specific requisition

change_detection.unique_key: Eightfold position id (pid) from the positions JSON; fallback canonical apply URL
change_detection.notes: JSON positions support first/last_seen; pin sort + page size (relevance ranking is nondeterministic); off-season returns count 0 — distinguish 'season closed' from 'feed broken'

plans.evidence: Eightfold AI confirmed — hsbc.eightfold.ai host, config 'hide_eightfold_branding': true, PCS endpoints observed (/api/apply/v2/profile/review/initialize_user?domain=hsbc.com); search returns a positions array with count. Downstream apply via apply.careers.hsbc.com and career2.successfactors.eu (SuccessFactors). Legacy hsbc.taleo.net is a separate older surface, not early-careers.
plans.uncertainty: Could not capture the raw Eightfold positions JSON endpoint URL/params live (internship+London search returned count 0, off-season), so exact query params and in-season UK-finance volume are unverified. Did not confirm whether early-careers reqs share the same tenant as experienced hires.
plans.notes: Eightfold public positions JSON confirmed; downstream apply via SuccessFactors. Off-season zero-count is expected.

validation_rules: Parse the tal.net advanced job board (/jobboard/vacancy/1/adv/); extract opp ID, title, location, deadline per vacancy
Filter location to UK/London AND title contains summer internship; exclude off-cycle, graduate/analyst, and non-UK (live snapshot showed Paris/Frankfurt/Zurich/Sydney)
Require finance scope (Investment Banking, Global Markets / Sales-Trading-Structuring-Research)
Validate each vacancy resolves to a live /opp/<ID>/en-GB detail page before publishing
On tal.net 'Quick Check'/cookie verification interstitial, retry rather than emit zero

change_detection.unique_key: tal.net opportunity numeric ID (the <ID> in /opp/<ID>-...)
change_detection.notes: Stable numeric opp IDs = clean dedupe and good first/last_seen; bot/verification interstitial can intermittently block fetches — needs retry/monitored handling

plans.evidence: tal.net host nomuracampus.tal.net, board /candidate/jobboard/vacancy/1/adv/, vacancy pattern /candidate/so/pm/1/pl/1/opp/<ID>-<title>/en-GB. Live board showed 6 internship vacancies with opp IDs, titles (Investment Banking Summer Internship, Global Markets), locations and deadlines.
plans.uncertainty: Did not see a UK/London summer internship live in the current off-season snapshot (only continental Europe + Sydney); UK presence inferred from external listings + seasonality. No public JSON/API endpoint observed; relying on HTML parse of the rendered board.
plans.notes: Dedicated nomuracampus.tal.net early-careers board confirmed; UK summer roles are seasonal.

validation_rules: Parse jefferies.tal.net job board (vacancy/2/adv); extract opp ID, title, location
Keep only UK/London + 'Summer Internship'; exclude Off Cycle, Analyst/Graduate, and full-time
Map division (Investment Banking, Private Credit, Sales & Trading, Research) — all in-scope finance; flag any non-finance
Validate each vacancy resolves to a live /opp/<ID>-...-/en-GB detail page before publishing
Detect and retry the tal.net 'Quick Check' interstitial; never emit a zero-count purely because the bot-check page was returned

change_detection.unique_key: tal.net opportunity numeric ID (e.g. 1637) from /opp/<ID>-...
change_detection.notes: Numeric opp IDs are highly stable and separate summer (1637/1640) vs off-cycle vs analyst — excellent first/last_seen; bot-verification interstitial requires retry/headful handling

plans.evidence: tal.net host jefferies.tal.net; board /candidate/jobboard/vacancy/2/adv; vacancy URL /vx/.../brand-4/candidate/so/pm/1/pl/2/opp/<ID>-<title>/en-GB. Observed live London summer opps 1637 (2026 IB Summer Internship – London) and 1640 (2026 Private Credit Investment Summer Internship – London), plus off-cycle and analyst. Direct fetch hit tal.net 'Quick Check' interstitial.
plans.uncertainty: Could not render the live board directly (Quick Check interstitial); opp IDs/titles confirmed via search-result URLs rather than a single live board parse. No public JSON/API endpoint observed.
plans.notes: jefferies.tal.net confirmed with live 2026 London summer IB/Private Credit opps.

validation_rules: Query Avature SearchJobs with internship keyword + UK location facet; paginate via jobRecordsPerPage/jobOffset
Keep only Summer Internship Programme roles located in UK/London; exclude graduate, junior associate, off-cycle, non-UK (live snapshot top result was Sao Paulo)
Require finance/business scope (Macquarie Capital, Commodities & Global Markets, etc.); de-prioritize pure-tech unless finance-relevant
Resolve and validate each JobDetail <id> to a live page before publishing (example JobDetail/18132 returned 404 — IDs rotate/expire, re-verify)
Confirm an active apply path via /careers/ApplicationMethods?jobId=... exists before marking applyable

change_detection.unique_key: Avature JobDetail numeric jobId (e.g. 18132, 7386) and/or record id
change_detection.notes: Clean numeric ids give dedupe and first/last_seen; 404 on cycled ids = removal signal; SearchJobs is source of truth; heavy filtering needed (472 total roles)

plans.evidence: Avature confirmed — host recruitment.macquarie.com, Avature paths /en_US/careers/SearchJobs, /careers/JobDetail/<slug>/<id>, /careers/ApplicationMethods?jobId=..., /careers/AgentRegister. Search uses jobRecordsPerPage/jobOffset; live search showed '1-9 of 472 results'. No public JSON/RSS feed observed.
plans.uncertainty: Did not see a live UK summer internship in the off-season snapshot (top intern result Sao Paulo); UK presence inferred from programme pages + prior-cycle URLs. No public JSON/RSS verified; seed JobDetail/18132 404'd (per-cycle ID churn). Exact UK location facet param not captured.
plans.notes: Avature recruitment.macquarie.com confirmed. NOT mq.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com (that is Macquarie University Workday, unrelated).

validation_rules: Keep only postings whose title/location indicate UK (London) AND match summer-internship/summer-analyst terms; exclude lateral, off-cycle, long-term, full-time analyst, and non-UK (US/Los Angeles)
Require a resolvable opp/<numeric_id> (or postings/<id>) in the canonical URL; reject any listing lacking a stable numeric ID
Confirm the year token (e.g. 2026) matches the active recruiting cycle; flag stale-year postings for manual review
Cross-check the role still resolves on tal.net (not a 'no longer available' page) before publishing

change_detection.unique_key: tal.net opportunity id (opp/<id>, e.g. 833) — stable, slug-independent
change_detection.notes: first/last_seen trackable by opp id; Imperva CAPTCHA gate on direct fetch — live extraction needs JS-capable/headless fetch or search-index fallback; deadlines visible on detail pages

plans.evidence: Official student/grad listings on rothschildandco.tal.net. Observed opp URLs with stable numeric IDs: opp/833 (2026 UK Global Advisory Summer Analyst Programme), opp/846 (Debt Advisory & Restructuring), opp/848 (Global Markets Solutions); also /candidate/postings/<id> and /candidate/jobboard/vacancy/2/adv/.
plans.uncertainty: Could not load the tal.net board live (Imperva CAPTCHA blocked WebFetch); inventory confirmed via search-indexed opp URLs, not a live full-board crawl. No documented machine-readable JSON endpoint (postings/<id> returns HTML).
plans.notes: Boutique on tal.net with clean numeric opportunity IDs; high relevance for UK finance summer internships.

validation_rules: Keep only London/UK + summer-analyst/summer-internship titles; exclude US roles, off-cycle, full-time analyst, and non-finance support roles
Require a stable opp/<numeric_id> in the canonical tal.net URL
Confirm active-cycle year token; Evercore recruits ~1.5 yrs ahead on a rolling basis, so verify the posting is the current open cycle and not a closed prior year
De-duplicate the tal.net posting against evercorecareersemea.com marketing page (treat tal.net as system of record)

change_detection.unique_key: tal.net opportunity id (opp/<id>, e.g. 2056)
change_detection.notes: first/last_seen trackable by opp id; rolling recruitment means roles appear/close quickly — favor 60-min polling, tighten to 15 in peak season; CAPTCHA gate applies to live fetch

plans.evidence: Official student listings on evercore.tal.net. Observed opp URL /candidate/so/pm/1/pl/2/opp/2056-2025-Real-Estate-Strategic-Advisory-Summer-Analyst-Program-London/, same so/pm/1/pl/2/opp/<id> structure as other tenants; board /candidate/jobboard/vacancy/2/adv/. Marketing microsite evercorecareersemea.com funnels to the tal.net board.
plans.uncertainty: Did not load the live board (CAPTCHA); current-cycle London inventory inferred from indexed opp URLs (a 2025 RESA London role directly observed; 2026 London roles via search summaries). No documented JSON API confirmed.
plans.notes: Boutique on tal.net, clean numeric opp IDs, high UK finance relevance.

validation_rules: Keep only London/UK + summer-internship/summer-analyst titles; exclude off-cycle (e.g. '6 months'), non-UK (Los Angeles), and full-time analyst roles
Require a stable opp/<numeric_id> in the canonical tal.net URL
Confirm active-cycle year token ('2026'); applications are rolling so verify the posting is still open before publishing
Normalize across URL variants (mobile-0/mobile-1, appcentre-1) to one canonical opp id to avoid duplicate records

change_detection.unique_key: tal.net opportunity id (opp/<id>, e.g. 3629)
change_detection.notes: first/last_seen trackable by opp id; CAPTCHA gate on live fetch; multiple cosmetic URL variants must be canonicalized to the opp id; rolling deadlines

plans.evidence: Official listings on lazard-careers.tal.net. Observed opp URLs opp/3629 (2026 Summer Internship Equity Research London), opp/3726 (2026 London Financial Advisory Summer Internship), opp/3630 (2026 Summer Internship Sales & Marketing London). Identical so/pm/1/pl/2/opp/<id> structure with brand-4/appcentre-1 params. lazard.com careers pages funnel to this board.
plans.uncertainty: Live tal.net board not loaded (CAPTCHA); 2026 London inventory confirmed via indexed opp URLs rather than a live crawl. No documented machine-readable JSON endpoint verified.
plans.notes: Boutique on tal.net, clean numeric opp IDs, high UK finance relevance.

validation_rules: Keep only EMEA/London + 'Summer Internship' titles; exclude Full-Time Analyst Programme, US/APAC, and non-finance roles (BlackRock is asset management — confirm finance/markets relevance per role)

Require both numeric URL segments (<companyId>/<jobId>); treat the trailing job id as the unique key and verify the detail URL resolves (200) before publishing — direct job-detail fetches returned 404 (id rotation/bot protection)
Confirm active-cycle year token and that the posting is in the EMEA region facet, not US-default
Reconcile careers.blackrock.com listings against any legacy blackrock.tal.net postings; prefer careers.blackrock.com as system of record

change_detection.unique_key: TalentBrew job id (trailing numeric segment of /job/.../<companyId>/<jobId>); fallback apply_url + title
change_detection.notes: first/last_seen trackable only if job id is stable — uncertain, detail URLs 404'd on direct fetch; monitor the EMEA listing page for change then reparse; a TalentBrew JSON search endpoint likely exists but was NOT observed

plans.evidence: careers.blackrock.com is a TalentBrew (TMP/Radancy) site — talentbrew.com asset references and URL pattern /job/<location>/<slug>/<companyId>/<jobId> (e.g. /job/london/2026-client-and-product-summer-internship-programme-emea/45831/...). Legacy blackrock.tal.net also appears in search. No Workday/Greenhouse/Lever/Oracle markers.
plans.uncertainty: Could not load the EMEA listing page's full inventory or any underlying TalentBrew/Radancy JSON search endpoint live (job-detail URLs 404'd; overview page exposed no listings/API in source). Could not confirm whether the trailing job id is stable across re-postings, nor whether legacy blackrock.tal.net is still active.
plans.notes: Custom TalentBrew/Radancy site, not a clean ATS feed; high scope relevance but extraction needs review.

validation_rules: Confirm listing originates from ekbq.fa.em2.oraclecloud.com site CX_2; reject any other host/site
Filter to UK/London location AND title matching internship/summer/placement (exclude graduate, off-cycle full-time, experienced hire)
Require a resolvable integer job ID and a working /job/<id> detail URL before publishing
Cross-check finance scope (Investment, Client Group, Wealth Management, Schroders Capital) against title/department; flag tech/ops-only interns as medium relevance

change_detection.unique_key: Oracle requisition integer ID in /job/<id> (e.g. 1081), namespaced to site CX_2
change_detection.notes: Use the Oracle Fusion CE JSON/REST search (recruitingCEJobRequisitions), not HTML (page is JS-rendered); stable IDs give clean first/last_seen; exact JSON request shape not live-verified

plans.evidence: Listings on ekbq.fa.em2.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_2/ (Oracle Fusion Candidate Experience). Job-detail paths /sites/CX_2/job/1081, /job/656, /job/609 with integer IDs; titles include '2026 Client Group Internship Programme', '2026 Schroders Capital Internship Program (Private Equity)', '2026 Wealth Management Internship Programme - UK'. A /jobs?iis=Trackr&keyword=... search URL was observed in the wild (a competitor tracker hitting the same surface).
plans.uncertainty: Could not live-execute the Oracle Fusion JSON/GraphQL XHR (page JS-rendered; HTML fetch empty), so exact payload/field names are inferred from the standard Oracle CE pattern. Total open-role count and complete UK finance internship list not enumerated live.
plans.notes: Competitor tracker observed hitting /jobs?iis=Trackr, confirming this is the canonical live listings surface.

validation_rules: Only ingest from fidelityinternational.tal.net brand-5/brand-0 candidate job board; do NOT log in or register — parse only the public vacancy list
For UK summer 2026, treat the 'Register Your Interest' opp as a single pre-registration entry, not per-discipline roles; do not fabricate individual role postings
Filter to UK/London; exclude Tokyo/Paris/Luxembourg/off-cycle entries from the UK-summer feed
Flag for human review whenever the pre-registration window vs live discrete roles transitions (streams open after pre-reg closes ~30 Nov)

change_detection.unique_key: tal.net opportunity ID in /opp/<id>-<slug> (e.g. 1256)
change_detection.notes: Clean opp-id dedupe key, but rich fields sit behind login (do not cross); parse only public job-board cards; first/last_seen trackable via opp IDs; deadline-driven churn each cycle

plans.evidence: Job board on fidelityinternational.tal.net (Oracle tal.net/TalentLink). Vacancy pattern /vx/mobile-0/brand-0/candidate/so/pm/2/pl/6/opp/<id>-<slug>/en-GB (opp 1256 'Register Your Interest - 2026 Summer Internships - UK'; opp 1129 for 2025). Live board showed off-cycle/non-UK roles and exposed Login/Register. Workday host fil.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com exists but is the separate experienced-hire/US tenant.
plans.uncertainty: Could not confirm whether Fidelity later publishes per-discipline UK summer roles as separate public tal.net vacancies or keeps everything behind the single pre-reg + login wall (login present, not crossed). No public JSON endpoint observed.
plans.notes: UK early-careers is a pre-registration funnel; discrete role listings appear later in the cycle.

validation_rules: Primary pull from Greenhouse public API https://boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/mangroup/jobs?content=true (job-boards.eu maps to the same mangroup token); reject other tokens
Also poll Workday mangroupplc/Man_Group_Careers and dedupe across both surfaces (same role may appear on both)

Filter to UK/London + summer internship titles (AHL IDI, Central Trading, Responsible Investment, Solutions, Summer Technology Internship); apprenticeships are UK early-careers but NOT summer internships — tag separately, do not publish as internships
Require a live Greenhouse absolute_url (gh_jid) before publishing

change_detection.unique_key: Greenhouse job id (gh_jid) for the Greenhouse feed; Workday externalPath/jobPostingId for the Workday feed
change_detection.notes: Greenhouse API returns stable numeric IDs + updated_at + locations — clean first/last_seen and update tracking; watch for the same role on both Greenhouse and Workday to avoid double-posting

plans.evidence: Live fetch of job-boards.eu.greenhouse.io/mangroup confirmed a Greenhouse board, token mangroup (EU instance), '66 jobs', with London early-careers entries. Separately mangroupplc.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/Man_Group_Careers is a confirmed Workday tenant. Aggregator mirrors show 'AHL IDI Summer Internship 2026' and '2026 Summer Technology Internship'.

Visible UK Greenhouse early-careers entries were apprenticeships; 2026 summer internships confirmed via aggregator mirrors, not read off the live board this session.

validation_rules: Pull from Workday CXS endpoint /wday/cxs/blackstone/Blackstone_Campus_Careers/jobs via POST (appliedFacets, limit, offset); reject any other tenant/site (esp. BX_External_Site)

Resolve each posting's externalPath to a live /job/... URL before publishing; require a Workday jobPostingId
Tag division (PE, Private Wealth, Strategic Partners, Credit & Insurance, Real Estate) — all finance-relevant, mark high

change_detection.unique_key: Workday jobPostingId / trailing requisition number in externalPath (e.g. 37058, 38838), namespaced to tenant blackstone, Campus site
change_detection.notes: CXS returns total, jobPostingId, title, locationsText, postedOn, externalPath — clean first/last_seen and dedupe; London facet keeps it UK-scoped; campus tenant separates interns from experienced hires

plans.evidence: Workday tenant blackstone on wd1 (blackstone.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com), campus site Blackstone_Campus_Careers. Observed job-detail paths confirming London summer roles: /job/XMLNAME-2026-Blackstone-Private-Equity-Summer-Analyst--London-_37058, /job/Blackstone-Credit-and-Insurance--Quant-and-Portfolio-Analytics-Summer-Analyst---London-_38838. Separate BX_External_Site tenant exists for experienced hires. eFinancialCareers mirrors 2026 PE/Private Wealth/Strategic Partners Summer Analyst (London).
plans.uncertainty: Direct GET to CXS /jobs returned 400 (Workday requires POST with a JSON facet body), so host/path and live /job/<slug>_<id> detail URLs confirmed but the JSON payload was not live-read this session. HTML listing page is JS-rendered (fetch empty). Total open-role count not enumerated live.
plans.notes: Use POST (not GET) for the CXS jobs endpoint. Campus tenant cleanly isolates interns from BX_External_Site experienced hires.

validation_rules: Enumerate roles from the public career-sitemap.xml (https://www.citadel.com/career-sitemap.xml); it loads normally (the Cloudflare 403 only gates the HTML pages to non-browser user-agents) and lists every /careers/details/<slug>/ URL with a <lastmod>

Fetch each /careers/details/<slug>/ with a compliant browser user-agent (a naive fetch returns Cloudflare 403; the pages are SEO-rendered and publicly readable). If a compliant fetch cannot retrieve detail bodies, fall back to sitemap-only change detection + manual review

Keep only roles whose detail page resolves location to London/UK (slugs use region tokens like '-europe'; Citadel's only European office is London — confirm from the page) AND that are interns/early-career in a finance/quant/trading or finance-tech function
Confirm current-season summer internship (not full-time/graduate/off-cycle) before publishing
Never submit the on-domain application or online assessment; stop at the public listing

change_detection.unique_key: /careers/details/<slug> path (stable role slug); sitemap <lastmod> as the update signal
change_detection.notes: Diff the career-sitemap.xml slug set for new/removed roles; use <lastmod> (observed 2026-06-05, fresh) for updates; first/last_seen trackable per slug. Off-season the UK intern subset can be empty — a zero count is a valid state, not a removed source

plans.evidence: Self-hosted custom careers site (citadel.com/careers); roles at /careers/details/<slug>/. Greenhouse tokens 'citadel' and 'citadelsecurities' both 404 -> NOT on Greenhouse; the application is completed on-domain ('submit resume via the website' -> online assessment), i.e. a custom flow, not a third-party ATS redirect. The public career-sitemap.xml loads fine and enumerates 34 /careers/details/ URLs incl. London/Europe interns: software-engineer-intern-europe, quantitative-research-analyst-intern-bs-ms-europe, quantitative-researcher-phd-intern-europe, international-equities-associate-intern-europe (all lastmod 2026-06-05). Detail pages are SEO-indexed (Google reads full title/description), so a compliant browser UA can parse them.
plans.uncertainty: Could not read detail-page bodies or any JSON/XHR with this fetcher (Cloudflare 403 on non-browser UA) — verified via the public sitemap + search-indexed content instead. A compliant browser-UA fetch is expected to work (pages are SEO-rendered) but must be confirmed in execution. Region slugs ('-europe') are not 'London'; confirm UK location per page. The on-domain application/online-assessment is gated and must not be crossed.
plans.notes: Reclassified from 'unknown' (2026-06-05 follow-up): the 403 was a user-agent block, not absence of a source. Source is the self-hosted site, deterministically enumerable via career-sitemap.xml. Genuine London quant/trading/SWE summer internships confirmed.

validation_rules: Source the intern feed from janestreet.com open-roles (filtered type=internship), NOT the Greenhouse board, which excludes internships
Locate the JS open-roles data endpoint (XHR/JSON powering the filtered list) before deterministic extraction; if only HTML is available, parse /position/<id>/ pages
Filter to London/UK office AND finance/tech (SWE, Quant, Trading) AND internship type; confirm summer (vs spring/off-cycle) via Season/Duration
Validate each role still resolves to a live janestreet.com /position/<id>/ page (not a closed-internship path)
Cross-check the Greenhouse API only as a secondary signal for non-intern roles; do not merge intern + experienced feeds

change_detection.unique_key: janestreet.com position id (the numeric /position/<id>/ slug; e.g. 7961782002)
change_detection.notes: position id gives stable first/last_seen; list is JS-rendered so a headless/XHR fetch is needed; Greenhouse API exists but is non-authoritative for internships

plans.evidence: Greenhouse board confirmed live at job-boards.greenhouse.io/janestreet ('Powered by Greenhouse', 204 jobs) and API boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/janestreet/jobs returns valid JSON — BUT every returned role is Full-Time/Experienced/New Grad; NO internships on the Greenhouse board. The internships page routes to janestreet.com open-roles (?type=internship) with on-site /position/<id>/ pages; listings are JS-rendered (no Greenhouse iframe on the intern page).
plans.uncertainty: Could NOT verify live: the exact XHR/JSON endpoint behind the JS-rendered open-roles internship list, the live count of London summer internships, or that intern apply pages never route into Greenhouse (intern page showed no Greenhouse iframe, but a sample /position/<id>/ apply destination was not confirmed).
plans.notes: Greenhouse token 'janestreet' verified live via API but contains only experienced/new-grad roles; internships live on janestreet.com's custom open-roles surface.

validation_rules: Pull from boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/point72/jobs (add ?content=true for descriptions); treat this JSON as authoritative
Filter to location containing London/UK (or EMEA programmes explicitly hosting London) AND title/metadata indicating internship AND finance/tech function
Confirm season = summer and the target year (parse title, e.g. '2026/2027 Summer Internship') to exclude Spring Insight, off-cycle, or full-time Academy roles
Validate absolute_url host is job-boards.greenhouse.io/point72/jobs/<id> and that the id resolves (not a removed posting)
Distinguish 'Academy' full-time grad programmes from true summer internships before publishing

change_detection.unique_key: Greenhouse job id (gh_jid / API id, e.g. 8183047002)
change_detection.notes: API id + updated_at give clean first/last_seen and reliable update detection; very low extraction risk; light check only to separate Academy full-time vs summer internship

plans.evidence: careers.point72.com resolves to a Greenhouse board; live at job-boards.greenhouse.io/point72 (token point72); public API boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/point72/jobs returns valid JSON (200+ jobs). Real London/EMEA summer-internship postings observed with gh_jid ids (8183047002 Data Engineer L/S Equities London; 8435134002 Academy Investment Analyst EMEA; 8149040002 Summer Internship – Strategy; 8150574002 Technology Internship – SWE). Front-end exposes Experience Level filter incl. 'Internships' and a London location filter.
plans.uncertainty: Could NOT verify live (minor): the exact current count of open London summer-internship postings for the active season (API response truncated at ~200 records), and the precise boundary the front-end uses between 'Internships' and 'Early Career' — both resolvable from the live API at poll time.
plans.notes: Greenhouse token 'point72' verified live via public API with multiple London/EMEA summer internships; deterministic official_api extraction. Highest-priority polling (15 min).
